faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about AI Report Tools

q1.question: What data sources does AI Report Tools support?
q1.answer: Currently we support key integrations for Russia & CIS: 1C:Enterprise, Ozon, Wildberries, and Yandex.Market. This is an MVP  additional integrations are on our roadmap. Need something specific? Contact us and we'll prioritize it.

q2.question: How secure is my data?
q2.answer: We use end-to-end encryption to protect your data. As an early-stage MVP, we don't yet have formal security certifications (SOC 2 etc.), but we follow secure development practices. Your data is never shared with third parties.

q3.question: Can I customize the report design?
q3.answer: Yes, completely! Our visual builder lets you customize fonts, colors, logos, layouts, and more. You can also embed custom CSS for advanced styling and create branded templates for your organization.

q4.question: What's the typical setup time?
q4.answer: Most customers have their first automated report running within 30-60 minutes. Our onboarding team can guide you through setup, and we offer pre-built templates for common report types to get you started faster.
